title: Amalgamation of Sir Shadi Lal Enterprises Ltd into Triveni Engineering and
  Industries Limited
---

## Summary

BSE has notified trading members that pursuant to a Composite Scheme of Arrangement approved by the Hon'ble National Company Law Tribunal (NCLT), Allahabad Bench, Sir Shadi Lal Enterprises Ltd (Scrip Code: 532879) will be merged into Triveni Engineering and Industries Limited. The record date for determining shareholder entitlement to Triveni Engineering shares is fixed at 03 June 2026, effective from which dealings in Sir Shadi Lal Enterprises Ltd equity shares are suspended.

## Key Points

- NCLT Allahabad Bench has approved the Composite Scheme of Arrangement for the merger.
- Sir Shadi Lal Enterprises Ltd (Amalgamating Company) is being merged WITH/INTO Triveni Engineering and Industries Limited (Amalgamated Company).
- Record date for the amalgamation is **03 June 2026**.
- Trading in Sir Shadi Lal Enterprises Ltd equity shares is suspended from **03 June 2026** (Settlement No. DR-643/2026-2027).
- Share swap ratio: **100 equity shares of Triveni Engineering and Industries Limited (face value Re. 1/- each, fully paid)** for every **137 equity shares of Sir Shadi Lal Enterprises Ltd (face value Rs. 10/- each, fully paid)** held.

## Regulatory Changes

Upon coming into effect of the Scheme of Amalgamation, Triveni Engineering and Industries Limited will issue and allot new equity shares to the shareholders of Sir Shadi Lal Enterprises Ltd in accordance with the approved swap ratio. The amalgamation was sanctioned by the NCLT, Allahabad Bench under the applicable provisions of the Companies Act.

## Compliance Requirements

- Trading members are advised **not to deal** in the equity shares of Sir Shadi Lal Enterprises Ltd (Scrip Code: 532879) with effect from 03 June 2026.
- Members must take note of the record date and communicate the suspension of trading to their clients.
- Shareholders of Sir Shadi Lal Enterprises Ltd holding shares as of the record date will be entitled to receive Triveni Engineering and Industries Limited equity shares per the swap ratio.

## Important Dates

| Event | Date |
|---|---|
| Notice Date | 01 June 2026 |
| Record Date for Amalgamation | 03 June 2026 |
| No Dealings / Suspension Effective | 03 June 2026 |
| Settlement Reference | DR-643/2026-2027 |

## Impact Assessment

Shareholders of Sir Shadi Lal Enterprises Ltd will cease to hold shares in that company post-amalgamation and will receive Triveni Engineering and Industries Limited shares at a ratio of 100:137. The face value difference (Rs. 10 vs Re. 1) should be noted when assessing the economic value of the swap. Trading members must immediately flag and restrict transactions in scrip code 532879 from 03 June 2026. Existing positions should be settled prior to the suspension date. The merger consolidates Sir Shadi Lal Enterprises' operations into the larger Triveni Engineering group.
